title: Shay Bushinsky
text: Home * People * Shay Bushinsky Shay Bushinsky, Nathan Netanyahu , David Levy [1] Shay Bushinsky , an Israeli computer scientist and chess programmer. Together with Amir Ban , Shay Bushinsky is author of the world class chess engine and multiple world champion Junior . He is researcher with the CRI Institute University of Haifa . His research includes opponent modeling search as well as evaluation function tuning with supervised learning methods [2] .
